audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass admits 2 adults for general museum admission for a reduced fee of $12 per person. Admission to the Chinese House is extra ($6 per person). You will receive a promo code to purchase discounted tickets. This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the lib

coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass admits 2 adults for general museum admission for a reduced fee of $12 per person. Admission to the Chinese House is extra ($6 per person). You will receive a promo code to purchase discounted tickets. This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.
